requirement_topic.en: Product Safety — Household Heat Pumps (LVD / EN 60335-2-40)
requirement_topic.zh: 产品安全——家用热泵（低压指令 / EN 60335-2-40）
requirement_topic.zht: 產品安全——家用熱泵（低壓指令 / EN 60335-2-40）

summary.en: Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU requires electrical safety compliance for heat pumps operating within 50–1000 V AC or 75–1500 V DC. The harmonised standard EN 60335-2-40 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers) covers insulation, overcurrent protection, earthing, and refrigerant-related electrical hazards. Note: IEC 60335-2-40:2022 (Edition 4) is the current IEC edition; CENELEC adoption status should be verified at time of compliance assessment.
summary.zh: 低压指令2014/35/EU要求工作电压在50–1000 V AC或75–1500 V DC范围内的热泵满足电气安全要求。协调标准EN 60335-2-40（家用和类似用途电器安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求）涵盖绝缘、过流保护、接地及与制冷剂相关的电气危险。注：IEC 60335-2-40:2022（第4版）为现行IEC版本；合规评估时应核实CENELEC采标状态。
summary.zht: 低壓指令2014/35/EU要求工作電壓在50–1000 V AC或75–1500 V DC範圍內的熱泵滿足電氣安全要求。協調標準EN 60335-2-40（家用和類似用途電器安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求）涵蓋絕緣、過流保護、接地及與制冷劑相關的電氣危險。注：IEC 60335-2-40:2022（第4版）為現行IEC版本；合規評估時應核實CENELEC採標狀態。

standards_or_laws: EN 60335-2-40 (harmonised standard — CENELEC adoption status to be verified)

summary.en: GB 4706.32-2012 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers) is China's national adoption of IEC 60335-2-40:2005. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) includes testing to GB 4706.32. The Chinese standard is based on an earlier IEC edition and Chinese test reports under GB 4706.32 are not accepted as equivalent to EU LVD conformity.
summary.zh: GB 4706.32-2012（家用和类似用途电器安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求）是中国对IEC 60335-2-40:2005的国家采标。中国强制性产品认证（CCC）包括按GB 4706.32进行测试。该中国标准基于较旧的IEC版本，GB 4706.32下的中国测试报告不被视为等同于欧盟低压指令合规。
summary.zht: GB 4706.32-2012（家用和類似用途電器安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求）是中國對IEC 60335-2-40:2005的國家採標。中國強制性產品認證（CCC）包括按GB 4706.32進行測試。該中國標準基於較舊的IEC版本，GB 4706.32下的中國測試報告不被視為等同於歐盟低壓指令合規。

gap.en: GB 4706.32-2012 is based on IEC 60335-2-40:2005 (older edition); the EU harmonised standard references a later edition. CCC certification under GB 4706.32 is not accepted as EU LVD conformity evidence. Re-testing to the applicable EN 60335-2-40 edition at an EU-accredited or recognised laboratory is required.
gap.zh: GB 4706.32-2012基于IEC 60335-2-40:2005（旧版本）；欧盟协调标准引用更新版本。基于GB 4706.32的CCC认证不被接受为欧盟低压指令合规证明。需在欧盟认可实验室按适用版本EN 60335-2-40重新测试。
gap.zht: GB 4706.32-2012基於IEC 60335-2-40:2005（舊版本）；歐盟協調標準引用更新版本。基於GB 4706.32的CCC認證不被接受為歐盟低壓指令合規證明。需在歐盟認可實驗室按適用版本EN 60335-2-40重新測試。

mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC certification required for domestic market)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — re-testing to EN 60335-2-40 under EU LVD required; GB 4706.32 certification not accepted as equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需按欧盟低压指令要求对EN 60335-2-40进行重新测试；GB 4706.32认证不被接受为等效。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需按歐盟低壓指令要求對EN 60335-2-40進行重新測試；GB 4706.32認證不被接受為等效。

requirement_topic.en: Commercial/Industrial Heat Pump Safety — EN 14276 Pressure Accessories
requirement_topic.zh: 商业/工业热泵安全——EN 14276压力附件
requirement_topic.zht: 商業/工業熱泵安全——EN 14276壓力附件

summary.en: For commercial and industrial heat pumps, Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU is the mandatory legal framework for vessels and piping that meet its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds. EN 14276-1:2021 (vessels) and EN 14276-2:2021 (piping) are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems and heat pumps; applying them can support a presumption of conformity with relevant PED essential safety requirements, but the standards themselves are not mandatory.
summary.zh: 对于商业和工业热泵，压力设备指令2014/68/EU是适用于达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的容器和管道的强制性法律框架。EN 14276-1:2021（容器）和EN 14276-2:2021（管道）是制冷系统和热泵的自愿协调标准；采用这些标准可支持对相关PED基本安全要求的符合性推定，但标准本身并非强制。
summary.zht: 對於商業和工業熱泵，壓力設備指令2014/68/EU是適用於達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的容器和管道的強制性法律框架。EN 14276-1:2021（容器）和EN 14276-2:2021（管道）是制冷系統和熱泵的自願協調標準；採用這些標準可支持對相關PED基本安全要求的符合性推定，但標準本身並非強制。

summary.en: GB 150 series (Pressure vessels — design and manufacture) and TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR/SELO) govern pressure vessels in China. The classification methodology, inspection regime, and registration requirements differ substantially from the EU PED and EN 14276 system.
summary.zh: GB 150系列（压力容器——设计与制造）和TSG 21-2016（锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程，由市监总局/特检院管理）管辖中国境内的压力容器。分类方法、检验制度和注册要求与欧盟PED和EN 14276体系存在实质性差异。
summary.zht: GB 150系列（壓力容器——設計與製造）和TSG 21-2016（鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程，由市監總局/特檢院管理）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。分類方法、檢驗制度和登記要求與歐盟PED和EN 14276體系存在實質性差異。

gap.en: EU legal compliance must be assessed against PED for pressure equipment within scope. EN 14276 vessel and piping methods differ from Chinese GB 150/TSG 21 classification, inspection, and registration practice; using the voluntary EN 14276 route may require re-design, re-inspection, and Notified Body involvement, but the mandatory obligation remains PED conformity.
gap.zh: 对范围内的压力设备，欧盟法律合规性必须按PED评估。EN 14276关于容器和管道的方法与中国GB 150/TSG 21的分类、检验和注册做法不同；采用自愿EN 14276路径可能需要重新设计、重新检验并引入公告机构，但强制性义务仍是符合PED。
gap.zht: 對範圍內的壓力設備，歐盟法律合規性必須按PED評估。EN 14276關於容器和管道的方法與中國GB 150/TSG 21的分類、檢驗和登記做法不同；採用自願EN 14276路徑可能需要重新設計、重新檢驗並引入公告機構，但強制性義務仍是符合PED。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED applies where pressure/volume/fluid-group thresholds are met; EN 14276 is voluntary and may confer presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 150 / TSG 21 / SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED classification and conformity assessment drive the mandatory obligation; EN 14276 is a voluntary harmonised route to presumption of conformity, while Chinese SELO/TSG certificates are not recognised under PED.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED分类和符合性评定构成强制性义务；EN 14276是取得符合性推定的自愿协调标准路径，而中国特检院/TSG证书在PED下不被认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED分類和符合性評定構成強制性義務；EN 14276是取得符合性推定的自願協調標準路徑，而中國特檢院/TSG證書在PED下不被認可。
